# 004 Core IR

Status: draft
Source of truth: libs/api/workflow-language/src/core/ir/workflow-ir.ts

## Purpose

Describe the normalized semantic model that workflow execution consumes.

## Normative Model

- WorkflowIR will be derived at run creation when the workflows integration lands.

- PR1 does not cache WorkflowIR in Postgres.

- Trigger maps normalize to ordered IR trigger lists.

- Job dependencies normalize to explicit dependency edges.

- Run steps normalize to explicit step IDs and typed default acceptance policies.

<!-- generated by libs/api/workflow-language/scripts/generate-formalization-docs.ts; do not edit generated sections directly -->
<!-- generated:start -->
- WorkflowIR type owner: `libs/api/workflow-language/src/core/ir/workflow-ir.ts`.

- Normalizer owner: `libs/api/workflow-language/src/core/ir/normalize-surface-document.ts`.

- ID helper owner: `libs/api/workflow-language/src/core/ir/ids.ts`.

- Expression/default-gate owner: `libs/api/workflow-language/src/core/ir/expression-ir.ts`.

- Trigger maps are sorted by trigger name and normalized to `TriggerIR[]`.

- Job maps are sorted by job name and normalized to `JobIR[]`.

- `JobIR.sourceName` preserves the surface map key for author-facing diagnostics.

- Job and trigger IDs are slugified from surface map keys with numeric suffixes for collisions.

- Step IDs use `<job-id>.<slugified step name or run command>` with numeric suffixes for collisions.

- The only PR1 acceptance policy in IR is `default_run_exit_code` with a typed `exit_code == 0` expression.
<!-- generated:end -->

## Examples

A job dependency map such as `deploy.needs: [build, test]` becomes explicit edges `build -> deploy` and `test -> deploy`.

Surface map keys `build main` and `build_main` normalize to job IDs `build-main` and `build-main-2`.

Two anonymous `run: pnpm install` steps in job `build` normalize to `build.pnpm-install` and `build.pnpm-install-2`.

## Adding Or Changing This Concept

Update IR types, normalizer tests, static semantics, runtime docs, and generated docs when adding IR concepts.

## Deferred Work

- Cached WorkflowIR persistence.

- Custom `gate.success_if` parsing and runtime evaluation.
